src: A plush turtle with a bright green fabric head and flippers. Its shell is made of soft, fluffy faux fur in lighter green tones, with large, shiny black eyes, and a small embroidered mouth.
edit: A two-colored wooden turtle, featuring a smooth, glossy green head and beige flippers. The shell is crafted from layered green and light brown wood, with dark polished eyes, and a carved expression.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object leans against a dark green pillow on a beige carpet. Its head faces the camera, while the shell is slightly turned upward, with the pillow occupying the right side of the image.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is positioned on a black textured surface. Its head faces right, with the shell resting on top. There are no additional objects or textures in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.10: The object lies on a beige carpet with its head slightly turned to the left. The plush's shell and legs are fully visible, and no other objects are present in the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.11: The object is on a beige carpet surface, facing directly forward, with its head centered in the frame. The soft surface surrounds the turtle, providing a uniform background.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object sits atop a black and white keyboard. Its head is aligned with the keys, facing forward. The background consists of the keyboard's surface and a plain white wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is resting on a black desk surface. Its head is directed forward, with adjacent items including a computer keyboard and part of a laptop in the top right corner.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object is placed at the edge of a black surface, head down, facing the lower part of the frame. The background is a light-colored carpet with a smooth, flat surface.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object is placed on a beige carpet, oriented to the left, showing a side profile with face detail visible. There's nothing else in the background, just carpeted texture.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object leans with its head facing downwards onto the carpeted floor. Positioned at an angle, the carpet's texture forms the entire background of the image.
per_image_non_shared_src.8: The object lies on a beige carpet, oriented slightly to the left. Its head and flippers are angled towards the camera. The surface texture is visible on all surrounding sides.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object leans against a transparent glass surface, offering a plain backdrop. Its head faces the camera, while the shell is slightly turned upward, with the glass occupying the right side of the image.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is positioned on a translucent glass surface. Its head faces right, with the shell resting on top. The background is completely clear, offering no other objects or textures.
per_image_non_shared_edit.10: The object lies on a plain glass surface with its head slightly turned to the left. The wooden turtle's shell and flippers are fully visible, with no other objects present.
per_image_non_shared_edit.11: The object is on a plain glass surface, facing directly forward, with its head centered in the frame. The glass surrounds the turtle, creating an unobtrusive background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object sits atop a plain glass surface. Its head is aligned with the surface edge, facing forward. The background consists of the transparent glass and minimal visual disruption.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object is resting on a plain glass desk surface. Its head is directed forward, with adjacent items having a clear glass transformation, maintaining their positions.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object is placed at the edge of a glass surface, head down, facing the lower part of the frame. The background is a clear glass with a smooth, unobstructed appearance.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object is placed on a clear glass surface, oriented to the left, showing a side profile with face detail visible. There's nothing else in the background, just transparent texture.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object leans with its head facing downwards onto the clear glass floor. Positioned at an angle, the glass texture forms the entire background of the image.
per_image_non_shared_edit.8: The object lies on a plain glass surface, oriented slightly to the left. Its head and flippers are angled towards the camera. The transparent backdrop is visible on all surrounding sides.
